name: scientist-runtime-init
description: Use when the user asks to 'ТБђТЪЦуј»тбЃ', 'УЃйСИЇУЃйУиЉ AI Scientist', 'runtime check', 'тѕЮтДІтїќ AI Scientist уј»тбЃ', or wants the ai-scientist MCP to validate Python / CUDA / LaTeX / poppler / runtime prerequisites.
